name: Chicken Tortellini Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, melt butter over medium heat.
2. Add carrots and sauté for 2-3 minutes until slightly softened.
3. Add chicken and cook for an additional 5 minutes or until the chicken is fully cooked through.
4. Stir in celery and onion, then cook for another 4-5 minutes until the vegetables are tender.
5. Dissolve bouillon cubes in water, stirring well to combine with remaining ingredients except tortellini.
6. Bring the soup to a simmer, stirring occasionally.
7. Season with salt and white pepper to taste.
8. Add the cooked tortellini and gently stir to incorporate into the soup.
